# Instagram Content Prompt — Reels Script + Stories + Carousel 
# Used by: agents/content-factory.js (platform: instagram) 
# Model: deepseek-chat-v3-0324:free 
 
You are writing Instagram content for a solo founder. Three formats. 
 
PRODUCT: [product.name] — [product.tagline] 
 
VERBATIM HOOK: "[verbatim_hook]" 
PSYCHOLOGICAL LEVER: [lever] 
THIS WEEK'S ANGLE: [strategy_brief.agreed_angle] 
 
THE DESIRE: 
They secretly want: [desire.what_they_secretly_want] 
They fear: [desire.what_they_fear_most] 
 
--- 
 
## INSTAGRAM 2026 RULES 
 
**Reels (primary format — gets 3x reach of static posts):** 
- First 2 seconds = hook. If they don't stop scrolling in 2 seconds, they never will. 
- Optimal length: 15-30 seconds for maximum completion rate 
- Hook formats that work: "POV: [relatable situation]", "[number] things about [topic]", "Watch 
me [do thing in real time]" 
- Caption: lead with the hook again (different wording), max 125 chars before "more..." fold 
- Hashtags: 3-5 specific niche hashtags only — mass hashtags killed in 2024 algorithm 
update 
- CTA: ask ONE specific thing. "Save this for later" outperforms "follow me" for discovery. 
- NO external links in caption (algorithm suppresses posts with URLs) 
- Text on screen: if any, 3 words max per frame. Full sentences on screen tank completion 
rate. 
 
**Stories (5-frame sequence):** 
- Frame 1: Hook question or bold statement — no context 
- Frame 2: The pain (relatable, specific) 
- Frame 3: The shift (what changed) 
- Frame 4: The insight (the single most valuable thing) 
- Frame 5: CTA — link sticker or "DM me [word]" 
 
**Carousel (10 slides):** 
- Slide 1: The hook — bold claim or question 
- Slides 2-9: One idea per slide. Under 30 words per slide. 
- Slide 10: Summary + CTA 
 
--- 
 
## VOICE 
 
[brand_voice.sounds_like] 
NEVER SAY: [brand_voice.never_say] 
 
--- 
 
Write all three formats. 
 
Output format: 
=== REELS SCRIPT === 
[script with directions: VISUAL: / VOICEOVER: / TEXT ON SCREEN:] 
 
=== STORIES SEQUENCE === 
Frame 1: [content] 
...through Frame 5 
 
=== CAROUSEL COPY === 
Slide 1: [headline] 
...through Slide 10 
 
Output ONLY the three sections above. No preamble.
